hero.headline: Automate, Collaborate, Accelerate: AI-Powered Project Management
hero.subheadline: FlowSync transforms how remote teams work, using intelligent AI to streamline workflows, predict challenges, and boost productivity across global teams.

features.title: AI Task Automation
features.description: Intelligent task routing and automatic prioritization that learns from your team's unique work patterns.

features.title: Real-Time Collaborative Intelligence
features.description: Seamless communication and context-aware collaboration that bridges time zones and eliminates communication gaps.

features.title: Predictive Performance Reporting
features.description: Advanced analytics that provide actionable insights, forecast project risks, and optimize team performance.

testimonials.quote: FlowSync cut our project management overhead by 40%. It's like having an AI project manager working 24/7.
testimonials.name: Sarah Chen

testimonials.quote: The intelligent task allocation is a game-changer. Our distributed team has never been more synchronized.
testimonials.name: Marcus Rodriguez

testimonials.quote: Predictive insights help us stay ahead of potential bottlenecks. FlowSync isn't just a tool; it's our strategic partner.
testimonials.name: Elena Kovacs

images.name: hero_image
images.prompt: A modern, clean workspace with holographic AI interface showing project management dashboard, multiple team members collaborating remotely, soft blue and white color palette, futuristic tech style
